best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-plantdata-003 title: duplicate plant name module: plant data management source pages: 1 preconditions: user is logged in. test data: plant name: rose, description: a beautiful red rose. test steps: 1. user navigates to the plant insertion page. 2. user enters the same plant name and a different description. 3. user clicks on the save button. 4. datamanager processes the insertion request. 5. datamanager returns an error indicating duplicate plant name. expected result: plant data insertion fails and an error message is displayed.
